chrom.description: A string representing the Chromosome of genome label or a character vector of chromosomes for a whole genome Manhattan plot

chromstart.description: An integer start of genome label

chromend.description: An integer end of genome label

assembly.description: A string specifying the default genome assembly or a plotgardener assembly object

fontsize.description: A numeric specifying text fontsize in points

fontcolor.description: A character value indicating the color for text

linecolor.description: A character value indicating the color of the genome label axis

margin.description: A numeric or unit vector specifying space between axis and coordinate labels

scale.description: A character value indicating the scale of the coordinates along the genome label

commas.description: A logical value indicating whether to include commas in start and stop labels

sequence.description: A logical value indicating whether to include sequence information above the label of an x-axis (only at appropriate resolutions)

boxWidth.description: A numeric value indicating the width of the boxes representing sequence information at appropriate resolutions

axis.description: A character value indicating along which axis to add genome label

at.description: A numeric vector of x-value locations for tick marks

tcl.description: A numeric specifying the length of tickmarks as a fraction of text height

x.description: A numeric or unit object specifying genome label x-location

y.description: A numeric, unit object, or character containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying genome label y-location

length.description: A numeric or unit object specifying length of genome label axis

just.description: A string specifying the justification of genome label relative to its (x, y) location

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x, y, or length are only given as numerics

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters

....description: Additional grid graphical parameters or digit specifications
